errors.description: Previous Merkle checkpoint evidence is missing, malformed, or does not match the proof.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny checkpoint continuity verification until the previous checkpoint is canonical and bound

errors.description: Current Merkle checkpoint evidence is missing, malformed, or does not match the proof.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny checkpoint continuity verification until the current checkpoint is canonical and bound

errors.description: Checkpoint chain ranges do not form a valid append-only extension.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny checkpoint continuity verification until checkpoint ranges are monotonic

errors.description: Consistency path leaves do not recompute the previous and current Merkle roots.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny checkpoint continuity verification until roots match canonical hash evidence

errors.description: Consistency path is missing, malformed, duplicated, or contains invalid hashes.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny checkpoint continuity verification until the consistency path is canonical

errors.description: Consistency proof reuses the same checkpoint pair or contains no append-only extension.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny checkpoint continuity verification until replay risk is resolved

errors.description: Consistency proof diagnostics contain sensitive or unredacted material.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny checkpoint continuity verification until diagnostics are redacted
